## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? What problem does it solve? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New applet
- [ ] New flag on an existing applet
- [ ] Breaking change (behavior / exit code / output format change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no functional change)
- [ ] CI / build / packaging

## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes (373/373)
- [ ] New or changed behavior has test coverage
- [ ] `mainsail <applet> --help` text updated in `mainsail/usage.py` (if flags changed)
- [ ] `README.md` applet table updated (if adding an applet)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies added (stdlib-only)

## Platform coverage

- [ ] Verified on Linux
- [ ] Verified on Windows
- [ ] Verified on macOS (or not applicable)
